name: Vitale Table Lamp - 22 Inch Height - TBL4475 - Black/Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Vitale table lamp, an elegant blend of design and functionality. Measuring 22 inches, this lamp features a sophisticated black and brass color palette that complements any decor. Built with solid iron, it offers a sturdy presence while maintaining a sleek and modern aesthetic. The Vitale lamp's minimalist structure adds a touch of sophistication to your bedroom, office, or living room. Its versatile design makes it perfect for a nightstand or end table, casting a warm glow that creates a welcoming atmosphere. Transform your home with this striking table lamp that artfully balances timeless style and contemporary appeal.
